title: HOOK — beach arrival
prompt: Wide cinematic shot on @beach-shore — bright sunny morning, gentle surf rolling in, soft sandy beach, blue sky with a few cotton clouds. @Mama already standing on the dry sand carrying a striped beach bag and a small cooler, sun hat and sunglasses on, smiling. @Sara already mid-stride next to her on the sand, holding a yellow plastic bucket and a red shovel, ponytail bouncing with excitement. @Eva already next to Sara, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow, holding a tiny pink boogie-board, eyes huge at the surf. Mama (warm, looking around): "Okay, sandcastle station — RIGHT here!" Sara (vibrating with energy): "I want to make TURRETS!" Eva (pointing at the surf, jumping in place): "WAVES! WAVES!"
